# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:aus_admiral_archduke_friedrich = {
    first_name = Archduke_Friedrich
    last_name = von_Habsburg_Lothringen
    historical = yes
    culture = cu:south_german
    female = no
    ideology = ideology_reformer
    commander_rank = default
    dna = dna_archduke_friedrich
    interest_group = ig_armed_forces
    birth_date = 1821.5.14
    traits = {
        basic_naval_commander
        brave
        meticulous
    }
    commander_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            OR = {
                AND = {
                    exists = c:AUS
                    c:AUS ?= THIS
                    c:AUS ?= { RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes }
                }
                AND = {
                    NOT = { exists = c:AUS }
                    exists = c:GER
                    c:GER ?= THIS
                    c:GER ?= {
                        owns_entire_state_region = STATE_AUSTRIA
                        RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        role = admiral
        earliest_usage_date = 1840.1.1
        latest_usage_date = 1870.1.1
        chance = 50
    }
}

    first_name = Archduke_Albrecht

    commander_usage = {
        country_trigger = {
            exists = c:AUS
